title: 毎日杯の後に・次は……え？

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I burst right through the spring hurdle! Hi-yah!
Call me Matikan-enter-the-dragon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Were you watching, Trainer? Fortune smiled on
me from the heavens!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thank you! With a race as important as this, I gave it my all—is what I would say if the gods hadn't already done the hard work for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now it's time to see what fate has to say about
my next race! Not that it should be much of a
surprise.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the first stage of the Classics, so it's
pretty obvious... But anyway, let's start up those
divinations!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna snatch a fortune slip quick this time. I
wonder what it'll be... Drumroll, please!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What in the what?! The Japanese Derby?!
Whazzat now?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Am I really supposed to just skip the Satsuki Sho
and dive straight into the Derby?! O gods,
enlighten me!
choice_data_list: This might be a challenge sent by the heavens.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A challenge... Yes, that must be it. The race that
every Umamusume dreams of—the very pinnacle
of the Classics...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Fine. If this is my destiny, I'll accept it with open
arms! Can I ask for your assistance?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank yooouuu! If you're with me, I can at least
try.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now let's hurry and buy up some lucky charms to
commemorate my new destiny. Ooh, and I can get
them to stamp my shrine passport while we're
there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: O-of course I'm going to train too. I'm sure you're aware that my efforts won't do much to change things...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But fret not... That doesn't mean I won't put all
my strength into this. After all, the Derby is a big
deal.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I shan't mar that sunny day! I'd like to hang a
fortune right from one of Fuchu's giant zelkova
trees while in good spirits!
